skills.label: Bugfix
skills.description: Trace, isolate, and fix bugs — regressions, runtime errors, flaky issues, and performance defects.

skills.label: Debugger
skills.description: Investigate code defects without applying a fix — root cause analysis and debugging handoff.

skills.label: Backend testcase writer
skills.description: Write detailed backend testcase documents for API endpoints, services, repositories, and workers/consumers.

skills.label: Business analyst
skills.description: Analyze requirements and produce SRS documentation.

skills.label: Domain Driven Design
skills.description: Laravel backend module design using DDD layers, Actions, DTOs, repositories, and events.

skills.label: Git workflow
skills.description: GitFlow-style git workflow — committing, branching, merging, PRs, releases, and conflict resolution.

skills.label: Review code
skills.description: Structured code review for backend services, APIs, and server-side code.

skills.label: Team Mini
skills.description: Boot a Claude Code + Codex agent team (Leader + on-demand Coder). Waits for user task before running.

skills.label: Team Full
skills.description: Full TDD agent team — spec → testcases → tests → implement → verify → review. Leader and Tester agents included.

skills.label: Make Task
skills.description: Create or update structured task documents from Jira, Trello, Notion, Linear, GitHub Issues, or plain descriptions.
